channel.title: Synthetic Local Feed
channel.description: Offline synthetic feed for Milestone 0 tests.

item.title: 阿尔派机器人推出区域客户维护平台
item.description: 阿尔派机器人发布产品平台，预计提升服务效率。 演示编号 101.

item.title: QuantHarbor appoints new chief operating officer
item.description: QuantHarbor appointed a new operating chief after a planned leadership review. Demo case 102.

item.title: 城籽食品发布例行投资者日程更新
item.description: 城籽食品发布例行日程通知，经营信息没有变化。 演示编号 103.

item.title: PrimeVale notes softer macro market orders
item.description: PrimeVale said market demand weakened and orders may face pressure this quarter. Demo case 104.
